name: fred_economic_search
description: Search FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data) for 800,000+ economic time series. Search by keyword to find series, or provide a series_id to get actual data observations. Common series: GDP, UNRATE (unemployment), CPIAUCSL (CPI), FEDFUNDS (Fed rate), DGS10 (10-year Treasury). Best for macroeconomic research, financial analysis, and economic indicators.

query.description: Search keywords to find economic data series (e.g., 'consumer price index', 'unemployment rate', 'housing starts'). Required unless series_id is provided.

series_id.description: Specific FRED series ID to retrieve observations (e.g., 'GDP', 'UNRATE', 'CPIAUCSL', 'FEDFUNDS'). When provided, returns actual data values.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results/observations to return (default 10, max 50)
